name: Greek Spinach Triangles
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Cream cheese, cut in chunks
recipeInstructions:
To reduce calories, you may use butter-flavored cooking spray instead of the butter.
Cook the spinach according to package instructions and drain well.
In a bowl, mix all ingredients except butter and pastry.
Refrigerate the mixture for at least 1 hour.
Open the phyllo dough package and cut a strip 2-inch wide, cutting through all layers. Keep the remaining dough covered with a damp cloth to prevent it from drying out.
Separate the dough into two sheets for each triangle. Brush the dough with melted butter and place a rounded teaspoon of spinach mixture on top of the strip. Fold the pastry over like folding a flag. Place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and brush the top with butter.
Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 20 minutes. Serve warm.
To freeze before cooking, brush both sides of each triangle with butter and wrap tightly. When ready to cook, bake until golden brown.
